nasb.text: Those who camp next to him shall be the tribe of Issachar, and the leader of the sons of Issachar: Nethanel the son of Zuar,

esv.text: Those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Issachar, the chief of the people of Issachar being Nethanel the son of Zuar,

cnv.text: 在他旁邊安營的，是以薩迦支派；以薩迦人的領袖是蘇押的兒子拿坦業，

ccb.text: 在犹大支派旁边安营的是以萨迦支派，首领是苏押的儿子拿坦业，
